narrative:
Precinct Madison (precinct in Muskingum County) has 298 registered voters — a small sample, so the figures below carry meaningful statistical uncertainty. Republican-leaning voters make up 29.9% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 12.8%, a pronounced Republican lean of 17.1 percentage points.
